news.headline: CEO of Eco Wave Power visited Taiwan for installation of technology as part of agreement with Lian Tat. (Numbers not provided)
news.summary: Inna Braverman, the Founder and CEO of Eco Wave Power, recently visited a site in Taipei, Taiwan, where the company's technology is set to be installed. This visit is part of an agreement made earlier this month between Eco Wave Power and the relevant parties. The visit took place on October 10, 2024.

news.headline: 1NCE has record year in IoT, boosts executive team with appointments and promotions.
news.summary: 1NCE, a rapidly expanding player in the Internet of Things (IoT) sector, revealed today that it has made significant changes to its executive team. The company, known for its fast growth, announced new appointments and promotions in its top leadership. Based in Cologne, Germany, 1NCE is making strides in the IoT industry with its innovative offerings.

news.headline: Liberty Broadband Corp announces Q3 earnings release. Conference call details undisclosed.
news.summary: Liberty Broadband Corporation, based in Englewood, Colorado, has recently announced the release of its third-quarter earnings report. The company will also be hosting a conference call to discuss the financial results. Shareholders and analysts are eagerly awaiting this update on the company's performance. The specific numbers and details of the earnings report will be revealed during the call, which offers an opportunity for stakeholders to gain insights and ask questions about Liberty Broadband's financial status and future outlook.

news.headline: Liberty TripAdvisor Holdings to hold quarterly Q&A conference call in Englewood, Colorado.
news.summary: Liberty TripAdvisor Holdings based in Englewood, Colorado, is set to host a quarterly question and answer conference call. Participants will have the opportunity to engage in discussions regarding the company's performance and outlook. This call is part of the regular investor communications strategy, aiming to provide transparency and updates on the company's operations. It is anticipated that significant financial figures and future projections will be discussed during the session.

news.headline: Qurate Retail, Inc. to release third quarter earnings report, Englewood, CO.
news.summary: Qurate Retail, Inc., based in Englewood, Colorado, recently made an announcement regarding their third-quarter earnings release and upcoming conference call. The company is set to provide financial information and insights during this period. It is anticipated that key financial figures and performance details will be shared with investors and stakeholders. This update signifies the company's commitment to transparency and open communication with its audience. The conference call is expected to offer a platform for discussing the quarter's results in further detail and addressing any queries from participants.

news.headline: Verra Mobility (NASDAQ: VRRM) plans to report Q3 2024 results on Oct 31 after market close.
news.summary: Verra Mobility Corporation, a prominent provider of smart mobility technology solutions, based in Mesa, Arizona, revealed its plans to release its financial performance for the third quarter ending on September 30, 2024. The report is scheduled to be made public after the market concludes on October 31, 2024. Trading under the ticker symbol 'VRRM' on NASDAQ, the company's results for this period are highly anticipated by investors and industry analysts.

news.headline: Robert Kraft's foundation launches '#TimeoutAgainstHate' campaign with multiple leagues, figures like Billie Jean King and Shaquille O'Neal to combat antisemitism.
news.summary: Prominent sports figures, including Billie Jean King, Shaquille O'Neal, Jim Harbaugh, Doc Rivers, Wilfried Nancy, Joe Torre, Ryan Blaney, Zach Hyman, Candace Parker, and Tierney Davidson, have come together in a campaign titled "#TimeoutAgainstHate." This initiative serves as a unified call to action against hate, featuring a mix of legends and rising stars. The campaign aims to rally support and raise awareness against hate. Follow the campaign for more details and messages from these influential personalities.

news.headline: Pickleball Kingdom, the world's biggest indoor pickleball entity, expands into Marlboro Township, NJ, reinforcing its presence in the state.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on October 10, 2024, Pickleball Kingdom, the leading indoor pickleball facility globally, revealed its plans to expand into Marlboro Township, New Jersey. This move aims to bolster the company's footprint in the state, offering another facility to enthusiasts and players. This expansion is part of Pickleball Kingdom's initiative to provide more venues for pickleball players, enhancing its reach and accessibility in the market.

news.headline: TeraWulf secures long-term lease at Lake Mariner, expanding to 157 acres for 750 MW capacity in up to 80-year deal.
news.summary: The lease term has been extended for up to 80 years, and the land area has been expanded to 157 acres to accommodate future growth. This expansion will increase the infrastructure capacity to 750 MW, allowing for significant improvement in supporting future development.

news.headline: TREMFYA® shows strong results in Crohn's disease and ulcerative colitis patients, FDA-approved for UC, under review for CD. Superior to ustekinumab for CD.
news.summary: TREMFYA® has received approval from the U.S. FDA for treating ulcerative colitis and is currently under evaluation for Crohn's disease. It holds the distinction of being the sole IL-23 inhibitor that has shown to be more effective than ustekinumab in the wider patient base of individuals with Crohn's disease, which includes both those who are new to biologic treatments and others.

news.headline: Genesys earns "Great Place to Work" certification, with 90% of employees surveyed recommending it, 33% higher than the US average.
news.summary: Genesys, a prominent global cloud company specializing in AI-powered experience orchestration, has recently achieved certification as a Great Place to Work®. A survey revealed that 90% of Genesys employees consider it a fantastic workplace, showcasing a notable increase of two percentage points from the previous year. This rating is 33 percentage points above the average for US-based companies. The certification was awarded in 14 different countries, emphasizing Genesys' dedication to prioritizing employee satisfaction and well-being.

news.headline: ImmunoPrecise Antibodies celebrates Nobel Prize in Chemistry awarded to David Baker, with Demis Hassabis and John Jumper also recognized.
news.summary: In Victoria, British Columbia, ImmunoPrecise Antibodies Ltd. (NASDAQ: IPA), an AI-driven biotherapeutic research company, is recognizing the recent Nobel Prize in Chemistry awarded to David Baker of the University of Washington in Seattle. The prize was granted for his work in computational protein design. Additionally, Demis Hassabis and John M. Jumper of Google DeepMind in London, UK, jointly received the award for their contributions to protein structure prediction. This recognition underscores the importance of advancements in this field.

news.headline: Four Seasons offers tailored holiday experiences; celebrating the season with guests worldwide. Toronto, Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: As the holiday season approaches, Four Seasons is gearing up to offer personalized vacation experiences, ranging from romantic escapes to thrilling adventures and gourmet dining events for loved ones. The luxury hotel brand, headquartered in Toronto, has announced its plans to usher in the festive season with a range of tailored experiences for guests. Stay tuned as Four Seasons welcomes visitors from around the world to partake in these special holiday offerings.

news.headline: FM:Systems integrates NetZero Advisor into FMS:Insights platform, enhancing workplace sustainability analytics. Raleigh, NC, Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: FM:Systems, a leading workplace management platform provider, revealed on October 10, 2024, the incorporation of NetZero Advisor into their FMS:Insights platform. The integration enhances workplace analytics capabilities for users, offering a comprehensive solution.

news.headline: Maris-Tech expands in the U.S, establishes subsidiary to boost growth in defense & homeland security sectors.
news.summary: A prominent company specializing in video and AI-based edge computing has founded a subsidiary in the United States to enhance expansion within the country's defense and homeland security fields. This strategic move aims to bolster the company's presence in key sectors, leveraging innovative technology to drive growth. The subsidiary's establishment underscores a commitment to furthering opportunities in the U.S. market and signifies a key step in the company's growth strategy.

news.headline: China and Japan ties at critical stage of improvement - Xinhua.
Aviz Networks partners with ITOCHU Techno-Solutions Corp. in Japan for AI networking solutions. Advancing 'Networks for AI' globally.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, Aviz Networks, a key player in AI-powered networking solutions, has revealed an exciting partnership with ITOCHU Techno-Solutions Corporation, Japan's premier tech reseller. This collaboration represents a significant step forward for Aviz Networks in their goal to promote 'Networks for AI' and 'AI for Networks' worldwide. As part of this new deal, ITOCHU Techno-Solutions Corporation will distribute Aviz Networks' cutting-edge AI Networking stack across Japan.

news.headline: Imprint secures $75M in Series C round led by Keith Rabois at Khosla Ventures, elevating its valuation to $600M.
news.summary: A prominent provider of contemporary co-branded credit cards, Imprint, revealed it has secured $75 million in a Series C funding. The investment was spearheaded by Keith Rabois from Khosla Ventures, with contributions from current backers like Thrive Capital, Kleiner Perkins, and Ribbit Capital. This financing round has pushed Imprint's valuation to $600 million, showcasing its ongoing success after forging partnerships with top brands. The funds raised will enable Imprint to further solidify its position in the market.

news.headline: Princeton TMX's NEXT Conference in Fort Wayne featured AI innovations for transportation networks.
news.summary: Exploring AI innovations and strategies to optimize transportation networks was the focus of Princeton TMX's NEXT Conference in Fort Wayne, Indiana. The event delved into cutting-edge technologies to boost logistic operations.

news.headline: Glia named to InsurTech100 list for 2nd year, hosting event with top insurance speakers. NY, Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: Later this month in New York, Glia, a leading customer interaction technology company, will host a customer event featuring a notable lineup of insurance speakers. Recognized as a 2024 InsurTech100 company for the second consecutive year by FinTech Global, Glia is set to showcase its strength in the industry.

news.headline: 76.5% of Americans support free period supplies in schools and universities, according to YouGov poll for Alliance for Period Supplies.
news.summary: In a recent poll conducted by YouGov for the Alliance for Period Supplies, it was revealed that over 75% of Americans support the idea of providing period supplies for free in public schools and universities. The survey, conducted in New Haven, Conn. on October 10, 2024, showed that an overwhelming 76.5% of participants advocate for this initiative. This data highlights a strong belief in the necessity of ensuring access to essential menstrual products for students and individuals at educational institutions.

news.headline: Unison wins contract to modernize Navy CNIC's CLM capabilities, utilizing AI-infused software technology.
news.summary: Unison, a prominent supplier of AI-integrated federal acquisition software, revealed on October 10, 2024, in Dulles, Virginia, that it has been chosen by the Navy's Commander, Navy Installations Command (CNIC), to enhance its Contract Lifecycle Management (CLM) capabilities. This selection marks a significant development for Unison, solidifying its position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: CMND-100 by Clearmind Medicine gets FDA approval for first human trial at second clinical site. #research #healthcare

Domino's Q3 sales grow 5.1% Y/Y to $1.08B, missing estimates. Global retail sales up 5.1%, with U.S. same-store sales rising by 3.0%. Gross margin expands to 39.2% from 38.8%. EPS at $4.19. Operating margin increases to 18.6%.
news.summary: Domino’s Pizza Inc reported third-quarter sales growth of 5.1% year-over-year, reaching $1.08 billion, which was slightly below the analyst consensus estimate of $1.10 billion. The rise in revenue was mainly due to increased supply chain revenues, U.S. franchise advertising, and U.S. franchise royalties and fees. This was supported by higher order volumes and food basket pricing. Global retail sales grew by 5.1%, excluding the foreign currency impact. In the U.S., same-store sales increased by 3.0%, while international same-store sales rose by 0.8%. The gross margin expanded to 39.2%, with U.S. company-owned store gross margin increasing by 1.0 percentage point, and supply chain gross margin up by 0.6 percentage points. Operating margin increased to 18.6% from 18.3% the previous year. EPS stood at $4.19.

news.headline: Introducing HORMEL® Pepperoni Confetti - fun new shape for a limited time. Launch announced on Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: For a brief period, savor the irresistibly bold flavor of HORMEL® Pepperoni in a fresh, playful form. Recently unveiled in AUSTIN, Minn., on Oct. 10, 2024, the creators of HORMEL® Pepperoni are thrilled to introduce HORMEL® Pepperoni Confetti - a daring, inventive shape that offers a new twist on a classic favorite. This limited edition product aims to provide a unique and exciting experience for consumers, featuring the same delicious taste with a fun and unexpected design. Don't miss out on trying this innovative snack, available for a short time only.

news.headline: NaaS Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: NAAS) focuses on interconnectivity charging business in China, using AI technology.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, NaaS Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: NAAS) revealed its strategic focus on interconnectivity charging services in China. As the initial U.S.-listed EV charging service provider in the country, NaaS aims to enhance its business using AI technology. This move signifies the company's commitment to growth and innovation in the EV sector.

news.headline: D3Energy unveils Utah's first floating solar array at Signal Hill Water Treatment Plant, advancing renewable energy for water utilities.
news.summary: In Park City, Utah, on October 10, 2024, D3Energy, a prominent company in floating solar technology in the United States, has been making strides in promoting renewable energy solutions for water utilities. Recently, the inaugural floating solar array in Utah was unveiled at the Signal Hill Water Treatment Plant. This marks a significant advancement in leveraging solar power to meet energy needs in the region.

news.headline: DNSFilter reports increase in malicious domains, malware accounts for over 50% of threats, stressing need for cybersecurity awareness.
news.summary: The percentage of malicious domains has been on the rise, prompting the need for training and stronger DNS protection measures. Recent findings from DNSFilter reveal a notable increase in threat levels compared to the previous year, with malware comprising over 50% of the threats detected. This highlights the urgency for organizations to implement robust cybersecurity measures to safeguard their systems and data.

news.headline: Spain's ecommerce market expected to grow by 9.45% annually, reaching US$87.9 billion in 2024. Report includes key players like Ali Express, Amazon, eBay, and analyses consumer demographics.
news.summary: The latest report on Spain's Ecommerce Market indicates a promising outlook. The sector is projected to experience a 9.45% annual growth, with an estimated market value of US$87.9 billion by 2024. The report covers various Ecommerce verticals including Shopping, Travel, Food Service, Media & Entertainment, and Technology, offering insights on over 100 key performance indicators. It also analyzes market share among key players, sales channels, payment methods, and consumer demographics. This data signifies a positive medium to long-term growth trajectory for Spain's Ecommerce industry.

news.headline: America First Credit Union partners with Diebold Nixdorf to enhance member experiences with new tech, improving ATM transactions.
news.summary: America First Credit Union, based in Ogden, Utah, and North Canton, Ohio, made history by becoming the pioneer in integrating transaction middleware technology. This strategic move enables their members to access enhanced features at ATMs, facilitating modern and secure transaction methods. The partnership with a prominent technology company marks a significant advancement in the credit union's offerings, ultimately benefitting their customers.

news.headline: O3 Mining (TSXV: OIII) engages marketing and market-making firms for services. Oct. 10, 2024 announcement.
news.summary: Toronto, October 10, 2024 - O3 Mining Inc. (TSXV: OIII) (OTCQX: OIIIF) has recently disclosed agreements for marketing consulting and promotional services. The corporation is set to receive market-making services under these agreements. O3 Mining's stock is listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol OIII and on the OTCQX under OIIIF.

news.headline: BSS Group acquires On Tap and Aitoc to bolster European eCommerce presence. Expansion into Europe through strategic acquisitions.
news.summary: BSS Group has taken a strategic step towards expanding into Europe by acquiring the leading EU-based eCommerce development firm On Tap. This move aims to enhance services across the continent, solidifying BSS Group's position as a global provider. The acquisition was announced on October 10, 2024, in Singapore. With this collaboration, BSS Group is set to leverage the expertise of On Tap to cater to a wider market, consolidating its presence in Europe.

news.headline: MaxCyte names Ali Soleymannezhad as Chief Commercial Officer on Sep 11, 2024, in Rockville, MD. Nasdaq: MXCT; LSE: MXCT.
news.summary: Rockville, Maryland - On October 10, 2024, MaxCyte, Inc. revealed the appointment of Ali Soleymannezhad as their Chief Commercial Officer, starting from September 11, 2024. MaxCyte, Inc., a prominent cell-engineering company, listed on Nasdaq under MXCT and on LSE under the same symbol, specializes in facilitating platform technologies to propel the advancement of next-generation cell-based therapeutics and innovative bioprocessing applications.

news.headline: OQ Chemicals in Deutschland receives EcoVadis Gold rating for 6th year, placing in top 5% of evaluated companies.
news.summary: OQ Chemicals, based in Monheim am Rhein, Germany, has achieved a Gold rating from EcoVadis for the sixth consecutive year. This places them in the top 5% of companies assessed in their industry.

news.headline: OQ Chemicals in Germany receives EcoVadis Gold rating for 6th year, ranking in top 5% of evaluated companies.
news.summary: OQ Chemicals, based in Monheim am Rhein, Germany, has achieved an EcoVadis Gold rating for the sixth year in a row. This places them in the top 5% of companies assessed in their industry.

news.headline: Paramount to release Q3 2024 financial results on October 30, 2024. Conference call on October 31, 2024 at 10:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Paramount Group, Inc. (NYSE: PGRE) disclosed plans to submit its Form 10-Q report for the quarter concluding on September 30, 2024, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The company will unveil its financial outcomes for the third quarter of 2024 on October 30, 2024, post the New York Stock Exchange’s trading hours. Subsequently, on October 31, 2024, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time, Paramount will conduct a conference call alongside an audio webcast.

news.headline: Tanger (NYSE: SKT) will pay a dividend of $0.275/share on Nov 15, 2024 to common shareholders of record on Oct 31, 2024.
news.summary: Greensboro, North Carolina-based company Tanger® (NYSE: SKT), known for its outlet and open-air retail shopping locations, has disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.275 per share. This payment is scheduled for November 15, 2024, and will be distributed to common shareholders recorded on October 31, 2024. Tanger Inc. (NYSE: SKT) boasts over 43 years of experience in the retail and outlet sector, solidifying its position as a premier owner and operator of such shopping destinations.

news.headline: Slate Asset Management will focus on essential real estate by accelerating its strategy, reducing office portfolio.
news.summary: Slate Asset Management, a worldwide alternative investment platform specializing in real assets, revealed their increased emphasis on crucial real estate. The firm aims to invest globally in real estate categories, focusing on assets that cater to essential daily needs such as grocery, residential, industrial and logistics, and healthcare. In line with this shift, Slate has announced its decision to prioritize these sectors.

news.headline: J.D. Power finds high satisfaction levels with wireless internet providers. Quality service noted.
news.summary: TROY, Michigan—According to J.D. Power, wireless internet providers are excelling in customer satisfaction with high ratings. The report highlights that consumers are generally pleased with the quality of service provided by wireless internet companies. The survey indicates a significant increase in satisfaction levels across the industry. Customers seem to have a positive experience with the reliability and reach of their wireless internet connections.

news.headline: Mitel introduces Mitel Interaction Recording (MIR) Insights AI to enhance business analytics with automated analysis.
news.summary: Mitel, a prominent company in business communications based in Sunnyvale, California, has launched Mitel Interaction Recording (MIR) Insights AI worldwide. This new solution aims to offer enhanced business analytics by automating the analysis and categorization of recorded communications. Making use of a GenAI engine supported by Microsoft Azure AI Services and OpenAI foundation models, MIR Insights AI grants customer service professionals access to AI-driven insights.

news.headline: Riverside Health partners with Abridge to enhance clinician & patient experience. Agreement covers 750 providers & all care settings.
news.summary: Abridge, a leading company specializing in generative AI for clinical documentation, recently secured a comprehensive expansion deal with Riverside Health, a prominent integrated care system based in South Eastern Virginia with a vast network of more than 750 providers. Following a thorough assessment of various options and a fruitful two-month trial period, Riverside has decided to deploy Abridge's services throughout all its care facilities and medical disciplines. This initiative covers a wide range of settings, including the emergency department and inpatient hospitals, aiming to enhance efficiency and accuracy in clinical documentation.

news.headline: Tesla is most shorted security in the Americas in Sept, H&M replaces LVMH in EMEA, per Hazeltree Report.
news.summary: In September, Tesla reclaimed its position as the most crowded large-cap security in the Americas, as per the recent Shortside Crowdedness Report by Hazeltree. The report highlighted that H & M Hennes Mauritz AB took over LVMH as the most crowded shorted large-cap stock in EMEA. Additionally, Commonwealth Bank of Australia and Toyota surpassed Mitsubishi Heavy Ind in terms of crowdedness. These findings showcase the dynamic landscape of crowded securities in different regions.

news.headline: iCapital launches Multi-Investment Workflow tool for wealth managers to simplify portfolio construction with 100,000 users.
news.summary: In New York, iCapital1 unveiled its Multi-Investment Workflow tool for the wealth management sector, catering to over 100,000 wealth managers on iCapital Marketplace. The tool simplifies the investment process, enabling financial advisors to handle numerous alternative investments within a single, cohesive workflow. The introduction of this innovative tool marks a significant advancement for iCapital in streamlining the investing experience for wealth managers.

news.headline: ON24 to release Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 7 after US markets close. Conference call at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time.
news.summary: SAN FRANCISCO-- ON24 (NYSE: ONTF) is set to disclose its Q3 2024 financial outcomes after U.S. markets close on Thursday, November 7, 2024. The management will conduct a conference call and webcast at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time (5:00 p.m. Eastern Time) on the same day to address business and financial performance. The event details are as follows: ON24 Third Quarter 2024 Earnings Call, scheduled for Thursday, November 7, 2024, at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time (5:00 p.m. Eastern Time). For webcast, visit investors.ON24.com.

news.headline: Pending U.S. home sales up 2% from a year earlier, biggest increase in 3 years, according to Redfin report.
news.summary: In Seattle, recent data from Redfin, the technology-powered real estate brokerage listed on NASDAQ as RDFN, shows a noteworthy 2% increase in pending U.S. home sales compared to a year ago over the four-week period ending on October 6. This marks the most significant rise in three years as per the report. The surge in demand also extended to earlier stages of the homebuying process. The Homebuyer Demand Index by Redfin, which gauges tours and other purchasing services provided by Redfin agents, stayed close to its peak since May last week. Additionally, mortgage-purchase applications also observed a positive trend.

news.headline: WEX Inc. (NYSE: WEX) to announce Q3 2024 financial results on Oct 24. Conference call at 10:00 AM ET.
news.summary: A multinational corporation, WEX Inc. (NYSE: WEX), revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 before trading begins on Thursday, October 24, 2024. The Chair and Chief Executive Officer, Melissa Smith, along with the Chief Financial Officer, Jagtar Narula, will lead a conference call at 10:00 AM ET the same morning to delve into the company's outcomes. The conference call will be available for live online viewing.

news.headline: Telesign wins Fraud Prevention award 2nd year in a row at CyberSecurity Breakthrough Awards.
news.summary: Telesign, a prominent provider of customer identity and engagement solutions, has revealed that their Verify API has been named the winner in the "Overall Fraud Prevention Solution Provider of the Year" category. This marks the second consecutive year that Telesign has been honored with this award. The recognition comes from the annual CyberSecurity Breakthrough Awards program, organized by CyberSecurity Breakthrough, a respected independent market intelligence entity that highlights the top companies in the industry.

news.headline: cTRL Therapeutics expands in Toronto with investment from FACIT, enhancing cell therapy development capabilities in Canada.
news.summary: In Toronto and San Francisco on October 10, 2024, cTRL Therapeutics revealed its plans to enhance Canada's cell therapy development capabilities with the establishment of a new laboratory. The biotechnology firm is focused on advancing innovative cell therapies for solid tumors. This move is expected to bring in a significant influx of scientific talent to bolster cTRL Therapeutics' capabilities in this area of research. The company aims to leverage this new lab and talent to further its development efforts in the field.

news.headline: North Highland named in 2 Forrester reports on AI in HR and customer-focused culture; highlights HR teams' lack of readiness for AI.
news.summary: In Atlanta, North Highland, a prominent change and transformation consultancy, has been recognized in two recent Forrester reports: "The AI-HR Paradox" and "Behaviors: The Building Blocks of Customer-Focused Culture." The "AI-HR Paradox" report delves into the suitability of HR teams for AI integration, noting their efficiency and productivity needs. However, it highlights that despite being strong candidates for AI, they lack readiness for its safe implementation, labeling them as "woefully underprepared." The report stresses the importance of addressing this gap to effectively harness AI benefits in the HR sector.

news.headline: Elanco Animal Health (NYSE: ELAN) to announce Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 7, 2024, and conduct conference call.
news.summary: Elanco Animal Health Incorporated (NYSE: ELAN) from Greenfield, Indiana, is set to reveal its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on November 7, 2024. This announcement will coincide with a conference call held on the same day for investors and media representatives to discuss the results.
